form.formComment: Entire returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last preparation by 1.0 len Munich LR October 25 over 1300m slow track defeating Goldaue carrying 58kg at $6.30. First up last campaign sixth of 14 at Hannover in the LR May 1 over 1300m, 3 len behind Breizh Sky with 59.5kg at $24. Anticipating a bright start to this prep.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five months. Finished off last campaign second last of 15 at Deauville All Weather in the LR November 2 over 1400m, 14 len behind No Lunch with 59kg at $23. Previously first up; ran last of 19 at Longchamp April 6 over 1400m, 11 len behind Lanzelot Gold with 62kg at $44. Unlikely to threaten.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Resuming after a break of five months. Previously first up; ran last of 19 at Longchamp April 6 over 1400m, 11 len behind Lanzelot Gold with 62kg at $44. Unlikely to threaten.

form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 43-day let-up. First-up after seven months 4th in a small field at Dortmund on February 22 over 1200m, 13 len behind Artistic Mission carrying 56kg at $14.70. Previously second-up 2nd of 12 at this track on April 21 over 1300m, 1.5 len behind Espero with 58kg at $10.90. Needs more time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(11.5). Second run back. Comes off a 43-day let-up. First-up after seven months 4th in a small field at Dortmund on February 22 over 1200m, 13 len behind Artistic Mission carrying 56kg at $14.70. Previously second-up 2nd of 12 at this track on April 21 over 1300m, 1.5 len behind Espero with 58kg at $10.90. Needs more time.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation fifth of 11 at Saint-Cloud in the LR November 9 over 1600m, on rain affected going; 7 len behind Trust On carrying 56.5kg at $35. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.3 len Praha September 20 over 1400m defeating Black Paws carrying 56.5kg at $6. Excellent chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3). Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of five months. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.3 len Praha September 20 over 1400m defeating Black Paws carrying 56.5kg at $6. Excellent chance.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign seventh of 13 at Munich in the LR October 25 over 1300m, soft track; 7 len behind Schutzenzauber carrying 57kg at $11.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.5 len this track April 21 over 1300m defeating Casall with 60kg at $9.80. Marginal prospect.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(4). Resuming after a break of five-and-a-half months. Finished off last campaign seventh of 13 at Munich in the LR October 25 over 1300m, soft track; 7 len behind Schutzenzauber carrying 57kg at $11.50. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.5 len this track April 21 over 1300m defeating Casall with 60kg at $9.80. Marginal prospect.

form.formComment: Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation 3rd in a small field at Dortmund on February 1 over 1200m, 3.5 len behind Vinnare carrying 57.5kg at $5.30. When resuming last campaign ran last of 11 at Ripon on August 4 over 1207m, 19 len behind Mister Sox carrying 63kg at $17. Will struggle against these.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Back from a spell. When resuming last campaign ran last of 11 at Ripon on August 4 over 1207m, 19 len behind Mister Sox carrying 63kg at $17. Will struggle against these.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of six-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign by 1.3 len Dusseldorf September 14 over 1700m slow track defeating Kolsch carrying 60kg at $3.70. When resuming last campaign ran last of 13 at Lyon-Parilly April 16 over 1350m, 15 len behind Tomakay with 56kg at $46. Expected to prove hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Resumes after a break of six-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of five-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign seventh of 12 at Chantilly in the G3 Prix De Seine-Et-Oise October 27 over 1200m, soft track; 10 len behind Spycatcher with 55.5kg at $41. When resuming last campaign third of 11 at this track May 18 over 1300m, 3 len behind Dream Seeker with 63kg at $6.30. Should be ready to run well.

formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Mare back from a spell of five-and-a-half months. Has placed previously first up from a break. When resuming last campaign third of 11 at this track May 18 over 1300m, 3 len behind Dream Seeker with 63kg at $6.30. Should be ready to run well.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign 12th of 15 at Deauville All Weather January 2 over 1300m, 7 len behind Mise En Boite carrying 56.5kg at $23. Previously first up; fourth of 14 at Chantilly October 2 over 1200m, 2 len behind Franciscano carrying 59kg at $13. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 10 at Chantilly All Weather on March 23 over 1400m, 1.2 len behind Zakosha carrying 57.5kg at $9.60. The start before that 8th of 16 at Saint-Cloud on March 5 over 1400m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Yoken carrying 59kg at $5.20. Not far away of late. Worth including.
